global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with geometric shapes and clear call-to-action text.
global.main_message: Promoting an exclusive offer for an app subscription.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the other elements.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A large rectangle and a circle are positioned in the center, overlapping slightly, with a lighter blue shade.

elements.label: Overlapping shapes
elements.description: Another circle is placed in the center, slightly smaller than the first, creating a layered effect.

elements.label: Rectangle shape
elements.description: A medium-sized rectangle is positioned slightly above the center, filled with a lighter blue color.

elements.label: Large circle
elements.description: A large circle is centered in the ad, filled with a soft blue hue, creating a focal point.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circle is located towards the bottom left, appearing as a decorative element.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent text block at the bottom features a bold white font stating 'Exclusive tonight Cancel anytime €9.99 Install now'.
elements.text_content: Exclusive tonight Cancel anytime €9.99 Install now

elements.label: App logo
elements.description: The text 'MoonScreen' appears in the top left corner in a clean, modern font.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: The text 'UGC' is displayed in the top left corner, indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline and call-to-action are positioned at the bottom, while the main subject shapes are centered.
